error_patterns.fix: Add component to REQUIRES in idf_component_register()

error_patterns.likely_cause: Serial port issue, boot mode, or driver problem
error_patterns.fix: Check port, install drivers, manually enter boot mode (hold BOOT, press EN)

error_patterns.likely_cause: NULL pointer dereference or invalid memory access
error_patterns.fix: Check EXCVADDR register: 0x0 = NULL pointer, garbage = uninitialized/corrupted pointer

error_patterns.likely_cause: FreeRTOS task returned, SPI flash pins reconfigured, or C++ missing return
error_patterns.fix: Use vTaskDelete(NULL) instead of return, don't reconfigure GPIO26-32, always return from non-void functions

error_patterns.likely_cause: Insufficient power supply or high current draw
error_patterns.fix: Use quality USB cable, external power supply, reduce current draw, or adjust brownout level

error_patterns.likely_cause: SSID mismatch, AP not in range, wrong WiFi band (5GHz), or security mismatch
error_patterns.fix: Verify SSID (case-sensitive), check 2.4GHz band, verify signal strength, check WPA2-PSK security

error_patterns.likely_cause: Config not found, not enabled, or target-specific
error_patterns.fix: Run idf.py menuconfig, check dependencies, verify target compatibility (use CONFIG_ESP32S3_*)

error_patterns.likely_cause: Task stack size too small or infinite recursion
error_patterns.fix: Increase CONFIG_ESP_MAIN_TASK_STACK_SIZE or task stack size, check for recursion

error_patterns.likely_cause: Heap corruption from buffer overrun, use-after-free, or double-free
error_patterns.fix: Enable CONFIG_HEAP_POISONING_COMPREHENSIVE, check for buffer overruns, verify memory management

error_patterns.likely_cause: ISR taking too long or blocking operation in ISR
error_patterns.fix: Move blocking operations out of ISR, reduce ISR processing time, increase CONFIG_ESP_INT_WDT_TIMEOUT_MS

error_patterns.likely_cause: Task not feeding watchdog or task stuck in loop
error_patterns.fix: Call esp_task_wdt_reset() periodically, check for infinite loops, increase CONFIG_ESP_TASK_WDT_TIMEOUT_S

error_patterns.likely_cause: Assertion condition failed, indicating programming error or invalid state
error_patterns.fix: Check assertion message and location, verify preconditions, review code logic

error_patterns.likely_cause: Operation timed out (WiFi, Bluetooth, SPI, I2C, etc.)
error_patterns.fix: Increase timeout value, check hardware connections, verify peripheral is responding
Free unused memory, increase heap size, check for memory leaks, optimize memory usage

error_patterns.likely_cause: PSRAM not detected, wrong config, or hardware issue
error_patterns.fix: Check CONFIG_SPIRAM, verify board has PSRAM, check PSRAM pins (GPIO26-32)
